description.ko: 심해의 유기 생명체 개념과 우주의 호흡계를 결합하여 천체 규모의 생물학적 폐를 형상화한 작품입니다.
description.en: A representation of a celestial-scale biological lung, merging the concept of deep-sea organic life with a cosmic respiratory system.

prompt: An ultra-detailed cinematic 3D render of AURA-7, titled 'The Cytoplasmic Nebula.' A vast, pulsating respiratory network of #7FB069 emerald moss-like membranes and #2D5A3D deep forest vascular vines forming a celestial lung. The entity is suspended in a weightless #E6F2E1 pearlescent liquid vacuum, rhythmically inhaling and exhaling clouds of #FFE66D golden bioluminescent spores that move like liquid silk. Macro focus on the translucent, semi-permeable cellular walls revealing internal capillary systems of glowing liquid sap. Rendered in Octane with hyper-realistic fluid dynamics, volumetric light shafts, and extreme soft focus bokeh. 8k resolution, capturing a divine, breathing organic flow.
